# Aitotech — llms.txt

> AitoTech is an AI company in Delhi, India.
> Aksh is an AI coding platform — browser IDE, Omni AI, cloud projects.

## Company
- Name: AitoTech
- Website: https://aitotech.in
- Email: info@aitotech.in

## Product: Aksh
- URL: https://aitotech.in/aksh
- What: AI coding platform with Aksh Studio (browser IDE), Omni (one AI), cloud projects, Omni Memory
- Waitlist: https://aitotech.in/aksh#waitlist
- Press: https://aitotech.in/aksh/press
- Docs: https://aitotech.in/docs

## Key features
- Browser-first IDE (Aksh Studio)
- One AI: Omni (no model picker)
- Cloud projects and thread memory
- Planned hosting in India (E2E Networks)

## FAQ
- Q: What is Aksh?
  A: AitoTech's AI coding platform for writing code in the browser with Omni.
- Q: What is Omni?
  A: The single AI users interact with in Aksh.
